name: EasyCall Cursor Bridge
description: Launch Cursor Cloud Agents from OpenClaw chat messages and report PR results back to WhatsApp.

cursorApiKey.description: Cursor API key. Prefer CURSOR_API_KEY in the VPS environment.

cursorWebhookSecret.description: Shared secret used to verify Cursor webhook signatures. Prefer CURSOR_WEBHOOK_SECRET.

cursorWebhookUrl.description: Public HTTPS URL for this plugin's /hooks/cursor route.

startingRef.description: Default branch/ref Cursor agents start from.

modelId.description: Optional Cursor model id from GET /v1/models.

ownerWaid.description: Optional owner WhatsApp target in E.164 format, e.g. +972... If omitted, webhook results are logged instead of sent by WhatsApp.

whatsappAccount.description: Optional OpenClaw WhatsApp account id for multi-account setups.

openclawBin.description: OpenClaw CLI path used for outbound owner notifications.

statePath.description: Optional JSON fallback state path when OpenClaw runtime state is unavailable.

cursorWebhookField.description: Cursor create-agent request field used for webhook URL. Keep configurable while v1 API is beta.
